# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: service-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-destination-rule
spec:
  host: "*"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_CONN
    connectionPool:
      http:
        maxRetries: 3
      tcp:
        connectTimeout: 30s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    connectionPool:
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_CONN
    connectionPool:
      http:
        maxRetries: 3
      tcp:
        connectTimeout: 30s
